text:
is an online multiplayer arcade game announced in February 2015 that was developed by . The game was cancelled on November 30, 2018.

Gameplay

Players were supposed to control a member of the Scout Regiment by using a controller shaped like a ultrahard steel blade, emulating the use of the omni-directional mobility gear to fight against Titans. Each character would have a special ability and skills.

The game would have two known modes:
Situation Mode - Players relive scenes from the anime. Available as single player and co-op.
Team Match Mode - Eight players divided into two teams compete against each other to see which team can complete the mission faster.
